title: Can Solar Power My AC?
description: A properly sized solar system can offset air conditioning usage, especially in sunny climates.
quickAnswer: Yes, solar can help power your AC, but air conditioning is energy-intensive and should be included in system sizing.

scenario.title: AC Usage Example
details: Solar production also peaks in summer
Battery may help with evening AC use

faqs.question: Will solar run AC during an outage?
faqs.answer: Only with proper battery and backup equipment. Standard grid-tied solar shuts down during outages for safety.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy homeowner solar resources
DSIRE state and utility incentive database
